title: Elevating Austria: Google invests in its first data center in the Alps.
description: <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/Google_Kronstorf_Data_Center_1.max-600x600.format-webp.webp">Google has been a proud part of Austria’s landscape for years, and today, we’re announcing our first data center in Kronstorf, generating 100 direct jobs.
